title: A systematic method of estimation of alongshore windstress and Ekman transport
author: Ray, Swain

steps.title: Method details
steps.instruction: Broadly, the method developed in this study consisted of 3 steps: estimation of coastal angle, estimation of windstress components, and computation of ET. An outline of this process is presented in Fig. 1, and details on each step are presented in the following subsections.Fig. 1Outline of process.Fig 1
